//: Register mt5-trading-mcp with Claude Code in your OWN project (when you pip-installed the package instead of cloning this repo - cloning auto-loads the project-scoped skills but does not commit a .mcp.json, so you register the server and add the read-only allowlist yourself; see 'Using with Claude Code' in the README). Save the 'mcpServers' block below as .mcp.json at your project root, or run: claude mcp add --transport stdio --scope project mt5-mcp -- python -m mt5_mcp serve. READ-ONLY SCOPING: allowlist the 11 read tools in .claude/settings.json under permissions.allow as mcp__mt5-mcp__<tool> (ping, get_terminal_info, get_account_info, get_quote, get_symbols, get_market_hours, get_rates, calc_margin, get_positions, get_orders, get_history); leaving the 4 mutating tools out makes them prompt per-call, or add them to permissions.deny (deny > ask > allow, first match wins) to hard-block. HTTP: run `python -m mt5_mcp serve --transport http`, then use {"type": "http", "url": "http://localhost:8765/mcp"} instead of command/args.
